# truenas_privilege (Data Source)

Provides information about a TrueNAS RBAC privilege.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_privilege" "admin" {
  id = 1
}

output "privilege_name" {
  value = data.truenas_privilege.admin.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric privilege ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `builtin_name` (String) Built-in privilege name, if this is a built-in privilege.
- `ds_groups` (List of String) Directory service groups (GIDs or SIDs) granted this privilege.
- `local_groups` (List of Number) Local group GIDs granted this privilege.
- `name` (String) The privilege name.
- `roles` (List of String) Roles granted to this privilege.
- `web_shell` (Boolean) Whether web shell access is enabled.
